pages.text: The Terrarium is a sealed multiblock that runs the whole frog loop on its own. Build the box, seal it, and pipe Slime Milk into the Controller: ceiling Sprinklers rain slimes down, frogs raised in the Incubators eat them, and the Froglights drop into the Hatch for piping out.

It is a 7x7x7 shell of any block in the terrarium_shell tag, around a 5x5x4 cavity (5 wide, 5 deep, 4 tall).$(br2)On one wall: the Controller (the brain - pipe milk here). Opposite it: the Hatch (output). An Incubator goes on a wall facing inward (it grows frogs in place; it is optional - lead or net frogs in instead). Sprinklers line the ceiling, facing down.

pages.name: The Terrarium
pages.text: Seal the shell, place the Controller, then look at it - it lights up when the structure is valid.

Drop a bottled Frog Egg into an Incubator to grow a frog inside the habitat, bred stats kept. Frogs bred inside lay into an Incubator instead of seeking water, and the box enforces a frog cap so it never overflows. The Hatch opens like a chest and also vacuums up loose drops in the cavity.
